protectionDamageModifiers.notes: Units in protection take only 20% damage and deal only 20% damage. Can be overridden via Editor_ fields.

visualGroupSize.notes: Crew is divided into visual groups of this size for the boarding combat UI. Each group tracks its own health and unit composition.

npcTargeting.description: NPCs randomly target 1-3 enemy visual groups (shuffled). They select min(random(1,4), enemyGroups.size) groups.
npcTargeting.playerInitialTargeting: Players target up to 3 enemy groups. If BoardingStartsWithNoTarget, targets 1 random group.

musketeersDefence.description: If ship has BoardingStartsMusketeersDefence, musketeer groups are auto-set to protection at start. Limited by BoardingProtectedGroupsLimit.

stealCannonChance.notes: Higher ship rank = lower steal chance

disallowConditions: Target is player with certain game rights restrictions
Target player is static with boarding restriction
Either ship is static, flooding, or burning
Target HP > 50% MaxHP (for players, unless testing mode)
